equity.label: S&P 500 equity signal
equity.note: A 5-session drawdown adds pressure. A 5-session rally adds relief and can partially offset the composite score.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Inflation pressure reflects both the breakeven level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2025-09-30 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 12.80
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-09-30: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 12.80/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. A positive 5-session S&P move also added equity relief. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-09-30, the score printed 12.80/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work. Equities also provided visible relief through a positive 5-session move.
